overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy walking through a tropical tribal settlement built on elevated wooden walkways. The character traverses from an overlook point through decorated entrances and along cliffside paths with views of ancient ruins and waterfalls, ending at a small camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden overlook of coastal tribal settlement

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden platform overlooking the settlement below, glancing at the coastal village

notable_agents.action: villager with headband standing by the walkway looking out over the settlement

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the elevated path underfoot
thick rope cables stretching across the settlement for traversal
tribal village with wooden structures built along the coastline and water
orange and green fabric banners strung between wooden structures

segments.scene_description: Aloy stands on an elevated wooden walkway overlooking a coastal tribal settlement. She walks forward along the planks, passing a villager NPC on the left, with colorful banners and rope bridge cables visible against the backdrop of the village and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated entrance passage with hanging tribal ornaments

events.description: entering a decorated stone passage with hanging tribal ornaments and carved totems

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs through a decorated entrance flanked by ivy-covered stone walls

entered.detail: stone archway entrance adorned with tribal decorations and hanging green ornaments
tall wooden totem pole with green and orange painted geometric patterns
vertical stone cliff face densely covered in green ivy vines

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a narrow decorated passage carved into the rock, passing under hanging tribal ornaments and walking up wooden stairs. The path is flanked by ivy-covered stone walls and tall carved totem poles, transitioning from the open overlook into a more enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cliffside walkway with panoramic views of ancient ruins

events.description: emerging from enclosed passage onto open walkway with expansive views of jungle ruins
distant waterfall becomes visible between the ancient overgrown structures

agents.ego_description: traversing elevated walkways while observing the ancient ruins and distant landscape

entered.detail: crumbling concrete and stone structures overtaken by tropical vegetation and trees
waterfall cascading down distant cliff faces between the ruins
tropical palm trees surrounding the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the passage, the view opens to reveal ancient ruins overgrown with jungle vegetation and distant waterfalls. Aloy continues along the wooden walkway, passing through a lush tropical environment with panoramic views of the crumbling structures and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage under rock overhang leading to small camp

events.description: entering shaded area beneath large rock overhang
slowing to approach and pass a standing guard NPC near the camp entrance

agents.ego_description: walking under the rock overhang and entering a small camp area with a market stall, passing a guard

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing watch near the path under the rock overhang

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop forming a natural roof over the path with hanging vines
small merchant tent with red and white fabric canopy and wooden poles
earthen ground path with patches of grass replacing the wooden planks

segments.scene_description: Aloy approaches and enters a shaded area beneath a large rock overhang, transitioning from wooden planks to a dirt path. She passes a guard standing watch on the right and approaches a small market stall with a red and white canopy, entering a quiet camp area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open coastal overlook through a narrow rock passage and into a lush jungle camp. It begins with Aloy walking along elevated wooden planks past colorful banners and villagers, with distant mountains framing the tribal settlement. As she moves forward, the open vista narrows into a decorated corridor carved from rock, where the camera follows her up wooden stairs flanked by ivy-covered walls and carved totem poles. The scene then expands as she emerges from the passage into a panoramic tropical landscape, gliding past overgrown ancient ruins and distant waterfalls. Finally, the path shifts from wooden walkways to a dirt trail beneath a large rock overhang, passing a guard and a red-and-white market stall to enter a quiet camp area.
